emergency_definition: Fire alarm activation at a client site
Access control failures at hospitals or schools
integration_constraints: Never promise same day service unless it is a confirmed emergency
Never create alarm inspection jobs in ServiceTrade without a signed work order first
after_hours_flow_summary: Emergency calls go to 24 hour monitoring center
questions_or_unknowns: What is the process for rotating on-call technicians and updating the on-call number?
How should non-emergency calls be handled after hours?
What is the average response time for emergency calls?
Are there any specific protocols for handling access control failures at hospitals or schools?
notes: Guardian Alarm Systems is a 15-year-old company with 12 technicians, providing fire alarm, security alarm, and access control systems installation and service. They have a 24 hour monitoring center and rotate on-call technicians weekly.
company_hours: Monday to Friday 8am to 5pm Eastern, Saturday 9am to 1pm Eastern (pending)
